title: Miki1106 Mod
description: A Mod containing Miki ingot, custom tools and armor, Hana cat costume, custom blocks and more.
body:
The Miki Ore is found underground in overworld, it is very common. The Miki Ore is Required to start the mod.

The mod is very unbalanced, Miki Tools can 1 shot almost every vanilla mob.

Miki Armor makes you basically invincible.

The Miki Armor gives you effects and buffs when wearing, here is a list:

  • Helmet: Night vision and Saturation
  • Chestplate: ability to fly
  • Leggings: Jump IV
  • Boots: Speed IV

Items and Blocks:

  • Miki Ingot
  • Hana Ingot
  • Miki Sword
  • Miki Pickaxe
  • Miki Axe
  • Miki Shovel
  • Miki Hoe
  • 4 pieces of Miki Armor (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings and Boots)
  • 4 pieces of Hana Cat Costume (Mask, Body, Leggings and Boots)
  • Hana and Miki Essence
  • Miki Maker
  • Essence Maker
  • Super Hana Block
  • Koraci

Mobs:

  • Buff Zombie
  • Player

Enchantments:

  • Instant Kill

WARNING Instant Kill just despawns the mob and the mob won't drop anything unless the weapon used can 1 shot the mob WARNING

The Player mob is found only in the Miki Dimension which is only accessible through commands or creative.

The Buff Zombie is a hostile mob found in all biomes and dimensions.

The mod also Has JEI Support
